title: Absorb, Accelerate, Act as a Risk Sponge
author: Ilya Grigorik
summary: Good leaders absorb risk to optimize learning rate, unblock teams, and break through indecision. A well-functioning team applies this fractally.

title: Guide to effective meetings
author: Ilya Grigorik
summary: Separate social, info-sharing, and decision-making meetings. Effective meetings require a process owner, agenda, preread, and curated attendees.

title: Good decision-making is good process
author: Ilya Grigorik
summary: Define the problem in own terms, take perspectives, validate signal, decide when to decide, and execute.

title: The Principal Engineer's Handbook
author: Ilya Grigorik
summary: Leadership without management: the what, the how, the tools, and how to measure success as a Principal+ engineer.

title: Professional Aptitude vs. Tenure
author: Ilya Grigorik
summary: Aptitude is the ability to perform a type of work. Tenure is the length of time in job. Their correlation degrades rapidly.

title: Making Good Group Decisions, Effectively
author: Ilya Grigorik
summary: Good decision-making is good process, used intentionally. Key lessons and principles to apply in your practice.
